query:
ALTER TABLE integracao_mapeamentos 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modoImportacao ENUM('completa', 'incremental') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'completa',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS colunaControle VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ultimoValorControle TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ultimaSincronizacao TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalRegistrosImportados INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ultimoValorControle TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ultimaSincronizacao TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalRegistrosImportados INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
